name: Leonardo Souza
title: Full Cycle Developer · AI / GPU Systems
bio: Full stack developer with over 5 years of experience building scalable, high-performance applications in remote and agile teams. I work with TypeScript, Python, and Java (Spring Boot) — from front-end and mobile (Next.js, React Native, Flutter) to back-end (NestJS, Django, FastAPI) — and take projects all the way to production with Docker, Portainer, Nginx Proxy Manager, and GitHub Actions. In personal projects, I research AI from scratch in Python and Rust, building language models and GPU inference engines without high-level frameworks.
